name: rgp-zk
description: ZK circuits and proof utilities for the Reputational Graph Protocol

scripts.setup:threshold: snarkjs groth16 setup build/ReputationThreshold.r1cs pot/pot20_final.ptau build/ReputationThreshold_0000.zkey
scripts.setup:membership: snarkjs groth16 setup build/MembershipProof.r1cs pot/pot20_final.ptau build/MembershipProof_0000.zkey
scripts.export:vkey:threshold: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/ReputationThreshold_final.zkey build/ReputationThreshold_vkey.json
scripts.export:vkey:membership: snarkjs zkey export verificationkey build/MembershipProof_final.zkey build/MembershipProof_vkey.json
